generated_message: ["Hey Sneh, I saw your post about TX Squad and the Thug Invitational. That's awesome energy! We actually built ProposalBiz because we were losing deals from proposals taking too long, same frustration you probably feel with manual work. AI builds the whole thing in seconds now.", "Yeah I feel that, we used to spend hours building proposals and still had no clue if they even opened it. ProposalBiz just builds the whole thing from a one line prompt and shows you exactly when they open it, completely changed how we follow up."]
